seo.title: Building AI Coding Assistant with Google ADK + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai coding assistant with Google ADK + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Coding Assistant with Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) enables powerful multi-agent systems powered by Gemini models for repository-aware code generation, sandbox execution, and iterative debugging. However, multi-agent delegation, model switching, and session state issues introduce risks like circular dependencies, output inconsistency, and security vulnerabilities. Vex provides essential guardrails to verify code correctness, prevent credential leaks, and ensure dependency safety in production deployments.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Coding Assistant Architecture with Google ADK
architectureOverview.description:
The AI Coding Assistant leverages Google ADK's multi-agent orchestration to create a code-aware workflow. A Router Agent delegates tasks to specialized agents: RepoContextAgent loads repository files and AST analysis, CodeGenAgent generates solutions using Gemini 1.5 Pro, SandboxAgent executes code in isolated containers, TestAgent validates outputs, and DebuggerAgent handles iterative fixes. Agents communicate via structured tool calls with shared session state for conversation memory.

Gemini model switching (1.5 Flash for speed, Pro for reasoning) occurs dynamically based on task complexity. Long conversations maintain state through ADK's session management, but this introduces risks of corruption. Tool responses must conform to strict JSON schemas across agents to prevent parsing failures.

The workflow processes user requests like 'fix this bug in main.py' by: 1) loading repo context, 2) generating code, 3) sandbox execution, 4) test validation, 5) iterative debugging until passing all checks.

risks.name: Multi-agent circular delegation
risks.description: Router Agent endlessly delegates between CodeGen and Debugger due to ambiguous task boundaries
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies delegation paths and enforces max delegation depth before execution

risks.name: Gemini model switching inconsistency
risks.description: Flash vs Pro outputs different code structures causing tool parsing failures downstream
risks.mitigation: Vex standardizes output schemas and validates format consistency across model switches

risks.name: Session state corruption
risks.description: Long debugging sessions corrupt shared context, mixing unrelated repo states
risks.mitigation: Vex snapshots and validates session state integrity per agent interaction

risks.name: Unverified code execution
risks.description: SandboxAgent executes malicious or credential-leaking code from unverified generations
risks.mitigation: Vex scans for security vulns, credential patterns, and dependency risks before sandbox

implementation.title: Router Agent with Multi-Delegation
implementation.description: Core router that delegates to specialized agents based on task type, using ADK's agent orchestration.
implementation.code:
from google_adk.agents import RouterAgent, CodeGenAgent, TestAgent, SandboxAgent
from google_adk.session import Session

router = RouterAgent(
    model='gemini-1.5-flash',
    tools=[CodeGenAgent(), TestAgent(), SandboxAgent()],
    delegation_rules={
        'codegen': 'CodeGenAgent',
        'test': 'TestAgent',
        'execute': 'SandboxAgent',
        'debug': lambda x: 'CodeGenAgent' if 'bug' in x else 'TestAgent'
    }
)

async def handle_request(session: Session, user_query: str):
    response = await router.delegate(session, user_query)
    return response

implementation.title: RepoContextAgent with AST Analysis
implementation.description: Loads repository context and performs static analysis before code generation.

implementation.title: SandboxAgent with Isolated Execution
implementation.description: Executes generated code in Docker containers with resource limits and output capture.
implementation.code:
from google_adk.tools import Tool
import docker

class SandboxTool(Tool):
    name = 'execute_sandbox'
    
    async def execute(self, code: str, deps: list = []):
        client = docker.from_env()
        container = client.containers.run(
            'python:3.11-slim',
            command=f'pip install {' '.join(deps)} && echo "{code}" > app.py && python app.py',
            mem_limit='512m',
            detach=True,
            remove=True
        )
        result = await container.logs(stream=True)
        return {'stdout': result.stdout, 'stderr': result.stderr}

implementation.title: TestAgent with Pytest Validation
implementation.description: Generates and runs pytest suite to validate code correctness and coverage.
implementation.code:
from google_adk.tools import Tool
import subprocess

class TestTool(Tool):
    name = 'run_tests'
    
    async def execute(self, code: str, test_cases: list):
        with open('temp_code.py', 'w') as f:
            f.write(code)
        
        test_code = f'''
import pytest
from temp_code import *
{chr(10).join(test_cases)}
'''
        
        with open('test_temp.py', 'w') as f:
            f.write(test_code)
        
        result = subprocess.run(['pytest', 'test_temp.py', '-v', '--tb=no'], 
                               capture_output=True, text=True)
        return {
            'passed': result.returncode == 0,
            'coverage': self.calculate_coverage(),
            'output': result.stdout
        }

vexIntegration.title: Vex Before-Agent Callback Setup
vexIntegration.description: Install Vex SDK and configure as before_agent_callback to intercept all agent interactions.

vexIntegration.title: Session State Integrity Check
vexIntegration.description: Prevents circular dependencies and validates session state before delegation.
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import SessionGuard

guard = SessionGuard(max_depth=5, max_session_length=100)

async def safe_delegate(self, session, task):
    # Check for circular delegation patterns
    if not await guard.verify_delegation_path(session.delegation_history, task):
        return {'error': 'Circular delegation detected'}
    
    # Validate session state integrity
    state_hash = await guard.hash_session_state(session.context)
    if state_hash != session.last_verified_hash:
        await session.rollback_to_checkpoint()
    
    # Vex verification
    verdict = await vex.verify({
        'code': task.get('code', ''),
        'session_state': session.context,
        'delegation_path': session.delegation_history[-10:]
    })
    return verdict

vexIntegration.title: Code Execution Safety Gate
vexIntegration.description: Scans generated code for security issues before sandbox execution.
